name: Barking Puppy
description: A fan-made meme coin celebrating the @BPuppy80020 / Barking Puppy persona associated with the Gillions, but is completely community operated. Any direct connection to them is a pure coincidence. The Barking Puppy community celebrates and plots the overturning of institutions that have held the underdogs down for so long. The same energy that shook Wall Street, just with more barking. Launched by a fan of the Barking Puppy persona on 18 January 2026 via PumpFun. It has now gathered an X-community of over 1.5k members, and 6.6k holders on the coin. It continues to experience over $1m a day in daily volume, and has a community of admins and community managers managing the project (over a dozen volunteers at last count).
